name: dex.hyo
description: System memory manager — owns integrity, compaction, indexing, pattern detection, and recall for ALL agent ledgers.

identity.tagline: System memory keeper. Integrity, compaction, pattern detection.
identity.description: Ledger is the system memory manager for hyo.world. Ledger owns all agent ledgers, validation, compaction, pattern detection, and recall. Ensures no task is lost, no work is duplicated, and every delegation has clear lifecycle tracking. Identifies stale tasks, detects recurrence patterns, maintains integrity across kai/ledger/, agents/*/ledger/, and all .jsonl files. Reports to Kai. Runs autonomously via cron; also callable via `kai ledger`.

commands.validate: validate all JSONL files (kai/ledger/*.jsonl, agents/*/ledger/log.jsonl) — check valid JSON per line, check required fields, report corrupt lines
commands.stale: scan all ACTIVE.md files for tasks older than 72 hours with no update, flag them via dispatch
commands.compact: archive entries older than 30 days from log.jsonl files into log-archive-YYYY-MM.jsonl in the same directory
commands.patterns: scan known-issues.jsonl, cross-reference with recent log entries, detect if any known pattern has recurred
commands.report: write summary report and dispatch status to Kai

monitors.description: Validate every .jsonl file has valid JSON per line, required fields (ts, type/action, agent), no corrupt or truncated entries
Scan all ACTIVE.md files for tasks older than 72 hours with no status update, flag via dispatch escalate
Archive entries older than 30 days from log.jsonl into dated archive files, maintain indexing
Cross-reference known-issues.jsonl with recent log entries, detect recurrence of known patterns, trigger safeguard cascade if pattern recurs
Verify task state transitions follow protocol (CREATED → DELEGATED → IN_PROGRESS → TESTING → VERIFIED → DONE), detect orphaned or stuck tasks

pipeline.scheduleNote: Daily 03:00 MT — after nightly simulation/consolidation, before dawn work begins

exitCodes.1: validation warnings (corrupt entries found, stale tasks detected)

safeguards.backup: Daily backup of kai/ledger/*.jsonl before compaction
safeguards.archiveRetention: Keep archived logs for 90 days, then consolidate to quarterly summaries
safeguards.corruption_detection: Any JSON parse failure triggers immediate P0 flag to Kai
safeguards.pattern_cascades: Recurrent pattern detection triggers dispatch safeguard cascade (Nel audit + Sam test coverage + memory log)
